name: trailAnalysis
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Detects sequence gaps, out-of-order timestamps, hash-chain breaks, unauthorized actors, duplicate sequence numbers, and statistical time gaps. Result card renders totalEvents / anomalies[].{event,user,reason} / userActivitySummary[].{user,eventCount} / suspiciousPatterns[] EXACTLY (the prior totalEntries/issues/actorSummary fields were NOT what the card read → the trail card was blank; fixed 2026-06-28; originals retained for parity + provenance). anomalies flatten each detected issue and resolve the actor from the issue's sequenceNumber when absent. Bad timestamps are NaN-guarded (isNaN checks) so timeAnalysis never leaks NaN. Empty trail returns an honest empty-shape message.
